compiled_state.title: 210 test files missing from .test-index — systemic registration gap
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description: Anti-pattern scan during fix of 9973-f309 found ~210 test files across tests/skills/, tests/agents/, tests/scripts/, tests/hooks/, and tests/plugin/ that are not registered in .test-index. This means changes to their corresponding source files will not trigger these tests via the test gate. Likely caused by incremental additions without updating .test-index.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Added 75 new test-index entries from generate-test-index.sh auto-detection. Remaining gap: 233 source files have no known tests at all (these are source files with no corresponding test file, not test files missing registration). The 75 new entries cover the cases where the generator found associations that fuzzy matching missed.
comments.author: Test
